subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Praise be unto the Lord of Oneness, Who hath guided thee to the Fountain of Life and led thee unto the path of salvation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله حمد کن حضرت احدیت را که ترا بمعین حیات هدایت فرمود و براه نجات
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @role and station of women
